old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-vn2c","title":"EC2 native_sim/native/64 picolibc build broken on aarch64","description":"The EC2 instance i-04b202fa2d3dcfa8f (aarch64 Amazon Linux) has broken picolibc builds for native_sim/native/64 targets. Errors include picolibc.h not found, autoconf.h race conditions, limits.h include_next failures. Root cause: parallel ninja race with header generation or missing toolchain setup for picolibc on ARM64 host.
